productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women Top Ten low Sleek White Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the women who love the brighter colour palette and a slimmer footwear Fit, the Top Ten Low Sleek shoe from adidas' Sleek Series collection is a great addition to your wardrobe.UpperSynthetic leather upper with a suede tow cap foxing, perforations on the toe region and textile lining along the collar for absolute style, durability and breathable comfortLacing system for a snug, customised fitMildly padded collar and tongue with a mesh inner lining for comfort and optimum fitMildly padded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves and a pivot point on the big toe mound for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to clean the toe guardDo not store in direct sunlight
